category.scope_note: Electric and cordless hand-held, transportable, and lawn/garden power tools exported from China to Zambia.

title.en: China-to-Zambia Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入赞比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入尚比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Zambia ZABS conformity assessment, ZS/IEC electrical safety, EMC, noise practice, restricted substances, and battery and radio requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与赞比亚 ZABS 合格评定、ZS/IEC 电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声实践、限用物质及电池与无线电要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與尚比亞 ZABS 合格評定、ZS/IEC 電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲實務、限用物質及電池與無線電要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Zambian law, ZABS conformity and import-inspection requirements, ZS/IEC standards, ZICTA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行赞比亚法律、ZABS 合格评定与进口检验要求、ZS/IEC 标准、ZICTA 无线电规定及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行尚比亞法律、ZABS 合格評定與進口檢驗要求、ZS/IEC 標準、ZICTA 無線電規定及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Zambia, the mandatory baseline is ZABS conformity assessment and import inspection with the ZABS mark, against ZS standards that adopt IEC (the ZS/IEC 62841 family for power-tool safety); cordless tools with radio functions also fall under ZICTA type approval. China GB/T 3883 evidence is a useful starting point but must be re-evidenced against the Zambian national conformity route.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入赞比亚，强制基线是按采用 IEC 的 ZS 标准（电动工具安全的 ZS/IEC 62841 系列）完成 ZABS 合格评定与进口检验并加贴 ZABS 标志；带无线电功能的无绳工具还须经 ZICTA 型号核准。中国 GB/T 3883 证据是有用的起点，但必须按赞比亚国家合格评定路径重新举证。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入尚比亞，強制基線是按採用 IEC 的 ZS 標準（電動工具安全的 ZS/IEC 62841 系列）完成 ZABS 合格評定與進口檢驗並加貼 ZABS 標誌；帶無線電功能的無繩工具還須經 ZICTA 型號核准。中國 GB/T 3883 證據是有用的起點，但必須按尚比亞國家合格評定路徑重新舉證。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set true.
